items.text: Phase 1. Review the current evaluator, supervisor, and goals-scheduler roles and confirm the approved checkpoint architecture
Phase 2. Move one-shot runtime stage contracts into `agents/rules/` and mirror them into packaged assets
Phase 3. Implement the mandatory post-plan evaluator checkpoint and keep the goals-only post-commit evaluator aligned with the rules-based contract
Phase 4. Run the full repository test suite, fix regressions, and leave `.dev` state synchronized with the completed work

next_action: Await user direction for commit preparation or any additional hardening beyond the completed evaluator/rules implementation.
